ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "actual_name" TEXT /* Actual name of the facility */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership type of the facility (e.g., PRIVATE, PUBLIC) */,
  "type_of_testing" TEXT /* Type of testing method used (e.g., rRT PCR, Cartridge - Based PCR) */,
  "license_validity" TEXT /* License validity period (e.g., 01/01/22 - 12/31/22) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number for the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the facility */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tests the facility can perform per day */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the province belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the province record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the province record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the city belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the address belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the address */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "mapping_address" TEXT /* Detailed mapping address */,
  "gmaps_url" TEXT /* Google Maps URL */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, healthcare professional, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "facility_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first facility in the partnership */,
  "facility_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second facility in the partnership */,
  "partnership_type" TEXT /* Type of partnership (e.g., affiliation, accreditation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the partnership (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the partnership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the partnership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_facility_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id_1") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_facility_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id_2") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_updates_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the service belongs to */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the service (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the service record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_ratings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reviews_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, review, rating) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
